name: Mount Teide
eruptionHistory: Last eruption in 1909 was from a vent on the northwest flank. Historical eruptions in 1798 and 1706. A Decade Volcano due to proximity to populated areas.
description: Mount Teide is the highest peak in Spain and the third-tallest volcanic structure in the world from its base. It is a UNESCO World Heritage Site and Spain's most visited natural attraction.
